hero_action: Seed rep: anchor seat orientation from the blind line.
explanation: Use blind anchors first, then map action order.
instruction_text: Start with seat orientation. Use blinds as fixed anchors before any action labels.

hero_action: Iso rep: keep the same orientation and repeat the seat class.
goal: Choose the small blind seat again.
explanation: Repeat the same action class to stabilize recognition.

hero_action: Iso rep: final confirmation of the same seat class.
goal: Choose the small blind seat one more time.
explanation: Third rep confirms deterministic mapping for this ladder.
